blocks.content: The End of Probability
When you assume rolling a die infinitely, what exists beyond that number.

blocks.speaker: Michelangelo
blocks.content: Now!
It was a solid and clear certainty, as if the whole world was converging into a single point.

blocks.speaker: Michelangelo
blocks.content: Michelangelo!
The sphere of light stretched into a flash and shot straight into Maginus' open mouth.
Kaaa…!
The time until the next change felt like an eternity, then Maginus convulsed violently.
It was 10 meters in front of Yahweh2.
Boom! Boom! Boom! Boom!
Internal chain explosions began, causing the machine to writhe unrealistically.
As the mafia group watched in awe, Maginus suddenly changed direction.

blocks.speaker: Maginus
blocks.content: Chase it! It's the final pattern!
Maginus, creating an ice tunnel, finally disintegrated under the sea.
As cold air sprayed in all directions, a huge ice cavity formed, and an item dropped there.
Whoa!
The mafia group, arriving at the cavity, checked the augmented reality and felt their hair stand on end.
Unidentified item drop: Legendary grade.

blocks.speaker: Maginus
blocks.content: Again, it's here!
If it was a legendary item obtained by hunting Maginus, it was undoubtedly Donatello.
Knowing the priority system, Shirone turned away instead of taking the box.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Shall we draw cards again this time?
The mafia group had a hunch.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: It's not a coincidence.
Though they couldn't guess the method, it was clear Yahweh2 could control probability.
Therefore, if he wanted, he could draw legendary items as much as he wanted.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Once equipped, it can't be traded, so the price fluctuation would be minimal. He'll rake in the galaxy.
The mafia, finishing their thoughts, spoke.

blocks.speaker: Mafia
blocks.content: Priority doesn't matter anyway. You take it. But we need to change the conditions.
This was the last chance since they couldn't trade after the event ended.

blocks.speaker: Mafia
blocks.content: Change the conditions?
We don't need the settlement. Instead, let's go one more round.

blocks.speaker: Mafia
blocks.content: You can draw legendary items, right? Can't you match one for each of us? We've been together all this time, so it's only fair.
Shirone shook his head.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Sorry, that's not possible.
Sona asked.

blocks.speaker: Sona
blocks.content: Why? It's so easy for you! It's even better than giving us the galaxy.
Dex Sensibility retorted.

blocks.speaker: Dex Sensibility
blocks.content: I'm an outsider. I don't want to disrupt the balance of this world. I'll leave after the Solar War.
The mafia felt a surge of anger.

blocks.speaker: Mafia
blocks.content: That's ridiculous. We're doing this because of the Solar War too.
Do you know how much the charging fee difference is?
Though the West Country wouldn't lose in this Solar War, there was no need to reveal it in advance.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I'll compensate you adequately. It will benefit you too. Getting too involved will be troublesome.
Too many forces were already entangled in the confrontation between Shirone and the operator.

blocks.speaker: Mafia
blocks.content: Tch! Is it because he's from the East Country?
Though it was obvious they were concerned about the Solar War, it was better to endure until the settlement was over.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Fine. Then contact Golden Wheel as soon as we get out. Settle it immediately.
I don't have a long-distance communication option. How about we meet in the neutral zone first?

blocks.speaker: Mafia
blocks.content: Are you kidding? Why say that now?
Was it necessary to mention it?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Well, you all know my level. I thought it was obvious.
Ugh.

blocks.speaker: Sona
blocks.content: If they didn't know, it would hurt their pride.
Sona suggested.

blocks.speaker: Sona
blocks.content: Then we'll contact them. Meeting in the neutral zone is impossible. If a large guild like Golden Wheel takes action, we'll be helpless. It's too disadvantageous.
Okay. Then contact them once we're out. You can reach Yolga's son or Aegis.
Of course, they knew the ranker's code names.
As the mafia group designated Yahweh2 as the priority, Shirone obtained the box.
Everyone gathered.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Look.
As the box opened, a smooth porcelain bottle was in Yahweh2's hand.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Oh! This is…
The event has ended.
The sound of waves was heard.
The starting point was a beautiful white sand beach on the outskirts of Moon Island, not the freshwater lake.
Shirone sighed in relief.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Phew, it's finally over.
Regardless of the difficulty, hunting in the West Country itself was a burdensome journey.
Sona approached.

blocks.speaker: Sona
blocks.content: Congratulations. Will you equip it right away this time too?
Shirone looked at the bottle in his hand.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Yes, I should.
Though he didn't know about other users, it was mentally comforting to equip it immediately.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Equip.
The porcelain shook and broke on its own, and a clear liquid metal like mercury floated in the air.
Wow…
As everyone admired, the liquid metal fiercely rushed into Yahweh2's mouth.
It was an irresistible system, and his whole body felt cold as if he had entered icy water.
Of course, it wasn't a bad feeling.
Installing new program.
A message appeared in augmented reality, and the existing scenery felt entirely different.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Huh? This…
It was a familiar feeling to Shirone.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Spirit Zone.
It was as if all the surrounding light was bending in, leaving no blind spots in his vision.

blocks.speaker: Sona
blocks.content: Are you okay? It was hard to tell from the video. It made me dizzy.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Of course.
The brain had to adapt, not the eyes.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: The recorded video only outputs what the eyes see. It would be an image of fragmented scenery overlapping in layers. If such an image moved in real-time, even I would get dizzy…
In Shirone's brain, it was organized into a perfect spherical landscape.
Of course, this was far from the usual concept of 'seeing.'

blocks.speaker: Sona
blocks.content: Can you move? In the video, people staggered and fell as if they were drunk, even those over level 300.
Dex Sensibility added.

blocks.speaker: Dex Sensibility
blocks.content: I saw that too. It caused Donatello's price to drop temporarily.
Legendary items vary greatly in efficiency depending on skill, but this was extreme.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: It was like giving Spirit Zone to an ordinary person whose concentration couldn't handle it.

blocks.speaker: Sona
blocks.content: Still, there are people who can handle it well, right?
Shirone nodded.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Since the number released is so small, one of the representative users in the West Country is Yagwi. I saw him dodging barrages in the Solar War, and it was amazing.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Yagwi.
He was a member of Ascension.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Could he be a real-life magician? Well, if someone has high concentration, they might adapt.
The mafia sneered.

blocks.speaker: Mafia
blocks.content: You've been standing still for a while. Are you dizzy? I told you not to equip it recklessly.
Hmm.
As Shirone took a step forward, the mafia group, who had been mocking him internally, was startled.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Let's see…
As he sprinted, the machine sped across the white sand beach at high speed.
The visual information was overwhelming.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: But for Shirone, who could handle not just Spirit Zone but also Elysion, it wasn't a hindrance.
This is good. This should offset the output difference with the operator to some extent.
At least he wouldn't lose his blind spots.
Turning again, Shirone tested precise movements beyond just sprinting.
As he performed circus-like dazzling maneuvers, the mafia group was momentarily stunned.

blocks.speaker: Mafia
blocks.content: What? He's running so well! Is this really the scene we saw in the video?

blocks.speaker: Mafia
blocks.content: Probably. Yagwi does that too.
As silence continued, Shirone suddenly braked and stopped in front of the group.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Phew, test over. This is really good.
The mafia felt a surge of anger.

blocks.speaker: Mafia
blocks.content: Well, I don't know about you, but Donatello is a difficult part to handle. The reason people go crazy for it is because of its special function.

blocks.speaker: Mafia
blocks.content: Special function?
It can detect stealth.

blocks.speaker: Mafia
blocks.content: Ah…
It's like seeing a shimmering outline.

blocks.speaker: Mafia
blocks.content: Even in front of a device that refracts light, stealth can't be perfectly visible.
But that's still amazing. You can remove the low-frequency detection option. It's like gaining an extra slot.

blocks.speaker: Mafia
blocks.content: What does it look like with that option?
You can't see it. Only the coordinates are marked as dots. That's why stealth option users are hard to deal with.

blocks.speaker: Mafia
blocks.content: Then wouldn't everyone use stealth?
Certain selective options require specific parts to implement. To use the stealth option, you need parts that match that option, but their combat performance is extremely low.

blocks.speaker: Mafia
blocks.content: At high levels, once you're caught, you're dead.
Kill or be killed. It's a binary choice.

blocks.speaker: Mafia
blocks.content: Exactly. That's why Donatello is amazing. It saves a slot and actually detects the form.
Now, the explanation is over. Will you contact them as promised?

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: As Shirone nodded, the mafia tried to contact Yolga's son.

blocks.speaker: Mafia
blocks.content: Will he answer?
Rankers usually block communication from all but specific users.
As the group waited anxiously, the mafia's expression darkened.
Then suddenly, his eyes widened.

blocks.speaker: Mafia
blocks.content: Oh? He answered.
The group gathered around.

blocks.speaker: Mafia
blocks.content: He answered? Really?
The mafia, gesturing for them to stay back, bent awkwardly and spoke.

blocks.speaker: Mafia
blocks.content: Hello? Hello?
Speak.

blocks.speaker: Mafia
blocks.content: I'm a user from the West Country, Mafia…
I know. I saw the news. What about Donatello?

blocks.speaker: Mafia
blocks.content: We just obtained it. We want to settle. Yahweh2 promised. The settlement amount is…
Verification first.

blocks.speaker: Mafia
blocks.content: Yahweh2, they want to verify first. Get close to the camera.
Shirone brought his right eye close.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Zoom in. Zoom in.
As his pupil filled the screen, circular letters were engraved around the iris.
Verification complete. Next, they want you to strike a victory pose to show you're really okay.

blocks.speaker: Mafia
blocks.content: Just send it quickly.
Though Shirone wasn't one to fall for Fermi's joke, the mafia was at a loss.

blocks.speaker: Mafia
blocks.content: Just send it! Sending now.
After the recorded video was sent, about 30 seconds later, Fermi's voice was heard.

blocks.speaker: Fermi
blocks.content: Seven people. Settled.
The communication was cut off.
The mafia, standing in disbelief, shouted as if the communication was still on.

blocks.speaker: Mafia
blocks.content: Hey! We haven't even adjusted the price yet! If you keep doing this, we'll…
M-Mafia.
As his colleagues stared at the air in a daze, a message appeared in the mafia's augmented reality.
The galaxy has been deposited.
Entering the link, an unprecedented amount blinked in his personal vault.

blocks.speaker: Mafia
blocks.content: What? What?
As he followed the zeros, his body trembled, and Sona raised her arms and shouted.

blocks.speaker: Sona
blocks.content: Yay! We did it! We did it!
Even as his colleagues high-fived and celebrated, the mafia couldn't believe it.

blocks.speaker: Mafia
blocks.content: Crazy people.
In front of an amount that defied common sense, he didn't even feel the greed to ask for more.

blocks.speaker: Sona
blocks.content: Hey, hey! Let's go to the shop! There are so many things I want to buy! We'll sweep up all the limited editions.
Seeing them celebrate, Shirone smiled but also felt a bit bitter.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Fermi.
It wasn't just bravado.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: An amount that could handle things most cleanly, based on a perfect understanding of humans.
There are many strong people in the world, but he was among the top ten he didn't want to fight, whether ally or enemy.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: I don't know what he's thinking. If he's an enemy, I'll have to defeat him eventually.
Suddenly, he wondered.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Why did Fermi choose the code name Yolga's son?
